ogTitle: Tumorrama vs Tumut Plains: Climate Safety

heading: Tumorrama vs Tumut Plains — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tumorrama, New South Wales and Tumut Plains, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tumut Plains has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Tumorrama (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tumorrama or Tumut Plains safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tumorrama has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Tumut Plains scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tumorrama scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Tumut Plains scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tumorrama or Tumut Plains?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tumut Plains has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
